Name: Verify Find Page Search and Navigate to Relationship Management Home
Description: Navigate to landing page, open IFS Cloud auth, log in, search for a page, then open Relationship Management home and verify pageHome.
Test Steps:

Step 2: Click on link ifsiCloud -> Navigate to page '/auth/realms/*/protocol/openid-connect/auth'
Step 3: Login -> Navigate to page '/main/ifsapplications/web/*'
Step 4: Click on input findPage
Step 5: Enter input value in input findPage
Step 6: Click on link relationshipManagement -> Navigate to page ''
Step 7: Take full page screenshot as checkpoint
